---
title: "Members"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
listing: 
  - id: pi
    contents:
      - "members/jake.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: false
    image-align: "left"
    max-description-length: 700
  - id: postdocs
    contents:
      - "members/xiaoyu.qmd"
      - "members/lijun.qmd"
      - "members/lea.qmd"
      - "members/hannah.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: false
    image-align: "left"
    max-description-length: 700
  - id: phds
    contents:
      - "members/jon.qmd"
      - "members/gabri.qmd"
      - "members/narjes.qmd"
      - "members/mirjam.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: false
    image-align: "left"
    max-description-length: 700
  - id: ras
    contents:
      - "members/ruoyi.qmd"
      - "members/gabriele.qmd"
      - "members/romina.qmd"
    type: default
    sort: false
    image-align: "left"
    max-description-length: 700
---

<div class="members-page">

![](members/images/group_050626.jpg)

------------------------------------------

## Principal Investigator

:::{#pi}

:::

## Postdocs

:::{#postdocs}

:::

## Graduate Students

:::{#phds}

:::

## Research Assistants

:::{#ras}

:::

------------------------------------------

## Bachelor / Master Students

<div class="student-gallery">

<div class="student-tile">
![](members/images/nadine.jpeg)
<strong>Nadine Li Pigida</strong><br>
Project<br>
Master in Bioinformatics
</div>

<div class="student-tile">
<img src="members/images/ruizhen.jpg">

<strong>Ruizhen Shen</strong><br>
Master Thesis<br>
Machine Learning, Systems and Control
</div>

<div class="student-tile">
<img src="members/images/yaqi.jpg">

<strong>Yaqi Jiao</strong><br>
Project<br>
Master in Bioinformatics
</div>

<div class="student-tile">
<img src="members/images/elsa.jpg">

<strong>Elsa Gustafsson</strong><br>
Internship<br>
Master in Biomedical Engineering
</div>

<div class="student-tile">
<img src="members/images/catarina.jpg">

<strong>Catarina Barreiros</strong><br>
Thesis<br>
Bachelor in Biomedicine
</div>

<div class="student-tile">
<img src="members/images/emma.jpg">

<strong>Emma Volcov</strong><br>
Thesis<br>
Bachelor in Biomedicine
</div>

</div>

## Alumni
<strong>Malo Gicquel</strong>, Master student (2023)<br>
<strong>Alma Lennartsson</strong>, Master student (2025-2026)<br> 

</div>
